title: Bhatinda Falls
tagline: Bhatinda Falls — heritage city of Jharkhand

overview.short: Bhatinda Falls is a waterfall located in Dhanbad, Jharkhand, approximately 14 km from Dhanbad railway station.
overview.description: Bhatinda Falls is a waterfall located in Dhanbad, Jharkhand, approximately 14 km from Dhanbad railway station. It is tucked away in the rough hillocks and verdant vegetation that surround it. The falls are surrounded by enormous boulders of rock.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhatinda Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhatinda Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhatinda Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (112 km) and the nearest railway station is Dhanbad Junction (14 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhatinda Falls?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhatinda Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhatinda Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Bhatinda Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhatinda Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bardubhi, Jatudih, Moonidih, Sansikhara, Amlabad.
